required_preferences.fact: Now prioritizes attending compliance workshops and state-sponsored trainings required for her certification, reducing attendance at local entrepreneurial networking events unless directly relevant to the new law.

supersedes.fact: Actively seeks local networking events and entrepreneurial meetups to attend with her brother, aiming to connect him with the Denver business community

required_preferences.fact: Adopts a strictly plant-based diet both at home and while traveling for work — avoids non-vegan dishes regardless of location

supersedes.fact: Eats a plant-based diet at home — only tries non-vegan dishes when traveling for work

required_preferences.fact: Blocks out daily two-hour morning study sessions for compliance exam prep until the mandatory certification is complete — pauses other creative work during this period.
Integrates a weekly therapeutic massage into her schedule during the trial month, prioritizing these appointments over less urgent work tasks
Reviews outstanding invoices and client payment histories every Monday morning — focuses on flagging potential risks and prioritizing collections
Never sets an alarm for weekends — prioritizes sleeping in to offset sleep debt accrued during the week

persona: A freelance financial consultant with clients across multiple industries
